The room cleanliness was disappointing — we found dust under the bed and the bathroom mirror had water spots. The pool was cloudy and the gym had several out-of-order machines. Staff seemed overwhelmed, and it took multiple calls to the front desk to get extra towels delivered.

The hallways smelled musty and our room had stains on the carpet that housekeeping apparently overlooked. The on-site restaurant was overpriced for the mediocre food quality, and the business center printer was broken. Staff were polite but slow to respond to our requests.

Our bathroom needed a deeper clean — the grout was discolored and the shower drain was slow. The swimming pool was open but the deck chairs were worn, and the exercise room felt dated. Service was lackluster, with the front desk taking too long to address our room temperature issue.

Cleanliness was below what we expected at this price point — the lobby looked tired and our room had dusty curtains. The hot tub was closed for maintenance during our stay, and the gym was cramped. Staff tried to be helpful but seemed undertrained and unsure how to resolve our concerns.

The room was not as clean as advertised — we found crumbs in the desk drawer and the bathroom floor felt sticky. The restaurant had limited options, and the gift shop was overpriced. Check-in took far too long, and the front desk staff seemed disinterested in our experience.

We were disappointed by the cleanliness of the common areas, with noticeable stains in the lobby carpet. The pool was too cold to enjoy, and the fitness center equipment was worn. Staff were available but not particularly helpful — our request for a room change was met with reluctance.

The bathroom had soap scum on the fixtures and the room felt like it hadn't been properly aired out. The spa was underwhelming, and the on-site cafe served mediocre coffee. The concierge had limited knowledge of the area, and service overall felt like an afterthought.

Room cleanliness was subpar — the sheets looked clean but the pillowcases had yellowing, and the bathroom tiles needed scrubbing. The business center was outdated, and the pool area was poorly maintained. Staff were cordial but ineffective when we raised concerns about our room.

The hallways were dimly lit and not as clean as we'd expect, with scuff marks on the walls. The exercise room was small and the equipment was dated, though the pool was usable. Service was inconsistent — some staff were friendly while others seemed indifferent to our requests.

Cleanliness could have been much better — we found hair in the bathroom sink and the floors needed mopping. The restaurant was decent but overpriced, and the gift shop had a limited selection. The front desk staff processed our checkout quickly but offered no warmth or follow-up.

Our room had dust bunnies in the corners and the bathroom mirror was smudged, which was disappointing. The swimming pool was lukewarm, and the gym had outdated machines. Staff service was below average — we waited twenty minutes at the front desk for a simple question.

The lobby cleanliness was acceptable but our room fell short — the nightstand was sticky and the shower had mildew spots. The hot tub jets weren't working, and the business center computers were painfully slow. Staff tried their best but seemed short-staffed and stretched thin.

Cleanliness in the room was mediocre at best, with visible dust on the TV and curtain rods. The on-site restaurant was convenient but the food was bland, and the exercise room needed an upgrade. Service from the housekeeping team was inconsistent, and the front desk was hard to reach.

The bathroom wasn't thoroughly cleaned — we found residue in the tub and the towels smelled slightly musty. The pool area had limited seating, and the gift shop was nothing special. Staff interactions were functional but cold, lacking the friendliness we expect from hotel service.

Our room needed better housekeeping attention — the trash hadn't been fully emptied and the mirrors needed wiping. The fitness center was barely adequate, and the restaurant served unremarkable meals. The staff handled our stay competently but with noticeable indifference.

The hallway outside our room wasn't well-maintained, and the room itself had dusty vents and a grimy remote control. The spa treatments were overpriced for the quality, and the pool was overcrowded. Service was slow, especially at the front desk during morning hours.

Cleanliness was disappointing throughout — the lobby floors looked scuffed, and our bathroom had soap residue from previous guests. The exercise room and business center both felt neglected. Staff were polite enough but not attentive, and housekeeping missed our do-not-disturb sign twice.

The room was passably clean but the bathroom fell short of our standards, with a stained shower curtain. The pool was functional but uninviting, and the on-site restaurant had limited hours. Service from the front desk was adequate but impersonal, and our requests took too long to fulfill.

We noticed the room hadn't been cleaned thoroughly — there was dust on the headboard and the bathroom sink had spots. The gym equipment worked but was outdated, and the gift shop was poorly stocked. Staff seemed busy and stressed, which showed in the quality of service we received.

The hotel's cleanliness wasn't up to par — common areas looked tired and our room felt like it needed a refresh. The swimming pool and hot tub were usable but not well-maintained. Service was hit-or-miss, with some staff being helpful and others seemingly going through the motions.
